message: Hello group, my paternal uncle is admitted to Max Super Speciality Hospital in Saket for a scheduled spinal decompression surgery this coming Friday. The doctors have requested us to arrange 2 units of B+ blood as a precautionary backup. He is currently stable and keeping fine. Please text me if you can volunteer to donate.

We need to arrange 3 units of O+ blood for a close family friend's planned open-heart bypass surgery at Fortis Hospital, Cunningham Road. The operation has been scheduled for Wednesday morning. The patient is stable and resting in the room. If any voluntary donors are free in Bangalore, please reach out to me.

A routine blood transfusion session is scheduled for a young thalassemia patient at Apollo Hospital, Greams Road, Chennai this coming Thursday. We require 2 units of A+ blood for the procedure. The child is completely stable at the moment. Please DM me if you are available to donate at the hospital blood bank.

Looking for 2 units of AB+ blood for my grandfather's scheduled laparoscopic gallbladder removal at Medanta The Medicity, Gurugram. The surgery is fixed for Friday afternoon. The patient is totally stable. Any leads or donors from the Delhi NCR area, please reach out to me directly on WhatsApp.

Requirement for 2 units of O- blood at Ruby Hall Clinic, Pune for a planned orthopedic reconstruction surgery in 3 days. The patient is stable in the ward, but because negative groups are scarce, the blood bank has requested us to bring replacement donors. Please reply if you can visit the facility to help.

My colleague's mother is undergoing a scheduled elective hysterectomy operation at KEM Hospital, Mumbai this Thursday. They need to arrange 2 units of A- blood before the admission process. She is currently stable and resting at home. If any A negative donor can volunteer to assist, please drop a message.

Need 3 units of B- blood for a planned oncology transfusion cycle at Tata Memorial Hospital, Mumbai, set for Saturday morning. The patient is perfectly fine and stable under observation. Looking for negative blood group donors ahead of schedule to avoid a last-minute rush. Please connect if you can help.

Looking for 2 units of AB- blood for a scheduled bone marrow transplant processing at Yashoda Hospital, Secunderabad. The procedure is set for day after tomorrow. The patient is stable. If any rare group donor can volunteer to help us out in Hyderabad, please contact our family immediately.

My father has a planned prostate surgery coming up this Wednesday morning at AMRI Hospitals, Salt Lake, Kolkata. We need to manage 2 units of O+ blood beforehand as a standard medical backup. He is perfectly fine and stable. Please text me if you can visit the hospital to donate.

Need 2 units of B+ blood for a scheduled bilateral hernia correction at SMS Hospital, Jaipur. The operation is planned for Friday morning. The patient is currently under observation and fully stable. If anyone is available to donate at the hospital blood bank counter, please message me.

Arranging 2 units of A+ blood for a routine total joint replacement surgery at SGPGI, Lucknow. The surgery is scheduled for Thursday. The patient is stable and keeping well in the general ward. If anyone can come down to the SGPGI counter to donate, please drop a message here. Thank you.

Looking for 1 unit of O+ blood for my cousin's scheduled minor ENT operation at Zydus Hospital, Ahmedabad. The procedure is fixed for Wednesday morning. The patient is stable. The hospital requested a single backup replacement donor. Kindly reach out if you can volunteer to visit the lab.

A planned C-section delivery is scheduled for my wife at Fernandez Hospital, Hyderabad this coming Thursday. We need to keep 2 units of B+ blood arranged as a standby measure. Mother is completely healthy and stable. Please ping me if you are free to donate at the hospital blood bank.

Need 2 units of A+ blood for a scheduled monthly transfusion for an anemic patient at AIIMS Bhopal. The procedure is set for Saturday morning. The patient is doing fine and is stable. If any voluntary donors are free in Bhopal this weekend, please support us by donating.

Requirement for 2 units of O+ blood for a planned kidney stone removal surgery at Paras Hospital, Patna this coming Wednesday. The patient is doing perfectly well and is totally stable. Please let me know if anyone is willing to visit the blood bank to help us out.

Looking for 2 units of AB+ blood at PSG Hospitals, Peelamedu for a scheduled spine decompression surgery fixed for Friday. The patient is stable and resting in the special ward. If anyone in Coimbatore can volunteer for a blood donation, please contact me immediately.

My aunt has a planned thyroidectomy scheduled for Thursday morning at Aster Medcity, Kochi. The medical team has advised us to arrange 2 units of B+ blood as a standard safety protocol. She is currently stable. Please get in touch if you can come down to the center to donate.

For a planned minor surgical procedure at PGIMER Chandigarh, we need to arrange 3 units of O+ blood by Friday morning. The patient is under routine clinical observation and completely stable. If anyone is ready to donate at the PGI counter, please contact me.

Hi, my friend's mother is undergoing a scheduled skin grafting procedure at Jehangir Hospital, Pune this coming Thursday. They need to arrange 2 units of A+ blood. She is stable right now. If anyone can volunteer to donate, please drop a message so I can connect you.

Need 2 units of B+ blood for a scheduled benign tumor excision at Belle Vue Clinic, Kolkata. The operation is planned for Saturday morning. The patient is in stable clinical condition. If anyone is interested in donating blood this week in Kolkata, please reach out via WhatsApp.

Arranging 2 units of O- blood for a planned vascular access surgery at MIOT International, Chennai. The operation is scheduled in 4 days. The patient is stable but the bank requires replacement for negative groups. Please reach out if you can volunteer to donate blood.

A planned cataract and minor facial reconstruction surgery is scheduled for Wednesday at Artemis Hospital, Gurgaon. We need to manage 2 units of A- blood for the procedure. The patient is completely stable. Please contact me if you are willing to visit the blood bank.

Looking for 2 units of B+ blood for a planned plastic surgery scheduled for Friday at Manipal Hospital, Old Airport Road. We need to arrange this as explicitly requested by the surgical surgeon. The patient is perfectly stable. Please get in touch if you are available to donate.

Requirement for 3 units of O+ blood at Hinduja Hospital, Mumbai for a scheduled routine colon procedure on Thursday. The patient is stable but needs the units arranged in advance as replacement. If anyone can visit the blood bank to donate, please drop a message here.

Need 2 units of AB+ blood for a planned orthopedic surgery at Narayana Nethralaya, Bangalore. The operation is fixed for Saturday morning. The patient is stable and keeping well. If any voluntary donors can assist us, please drop a direct message. Thank you so much.

Annual Mega Blood Donation Camp organized by Rotary Club Delhi at Central Park, Connaught Place this Sunday from 9:30 AM to 5:00 PM. Free certificates and healthy refreshments for all voluntary donors. Come forward and help save lives! Let's do our bit.

A huge thank you to Mr. Anand Verma who came down to Max Hospital, Saket yesterday to donate blood for my mother's procedure. The surgery went really well and she is recovering nicely now. Truly grateful for this kind gesture! Humanity still exists.

Quick question to the group: Can someone donate blood if they recently recovered from standard seasonal flu? My friend wants to donate in an upcoming drive in Bangalore next week but finished his medicines 10 days ago. What are the official rules?

Lions Club Chennai is organizing a voluntary blood donor registration drive at the T-Nagar association hall this Saturday. Registering yourself helps regional blood banks track you easily during major shortages. Please bring an ID card. Timing 10 AM onwards.

Did you know that donating blood regularly reduces excess iron accumulation in the body and helps maintain excellent cardiovascular health? It's a healthy habit that acts as a lifeline for someone else. Visit your nearest certified blood bank in Kolkata today.

Official Inventory Update: The Blood Bank at Nizam's Institute of Medical Sciences (NIMS), Hyderabad has updated its stock levels. They have an ongoing shortage of A- and O- negative units right now. Voluntary negative group donors are requested to visit this week.
hospital: Nizam's Institute of Medical Sciences, Hyderabad

message: Proud to share that our college student council at Pune University successfully gathered 140 units of blood in collaboration with the local Red Cross Society yesterday. A massive shoutout to all the brave student donors who took out time to support this noble cause!

Is there a specific weight limit or minimum hemoglobin requirement for women to donate blood in India? My sister wants to participate in an upcoming donation drive in Jaipur next Tuesday but wanted to check the medical criteria first. Any guidance?

SGPGI Lucknow is organizing a public health awareness seminar coupled with a voluntary blood donation desk on World Blood Donor Day. Venue: Administrative Block Ground, SGPGI. Time: 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM. Complimentary basic health checks provided for all.

Deeply thankful to the two gentlemen who reached out via Twitter and donated A+ blood at Civil Hospital Ahmedabad for my father's planned surgery yesterday. Your selfless altruism ensured everything went safely. Truly appreciate your incredible support!

Massive Blood Donation Drive scheduled this Friday at Infopark Campus, Kakkanad, Kochi. Managed by the local IMA Blood Bank team. Requesting all IT professionals and corporate employees to spare 15 minutes and save lives. Location: Phase 1 Auditorium.

Can anyone provide the latest operational hours and contact numbers for the government blood bank located at GMCH Sector 32, Chandigarh? Need to call them regarding standard exchange formalities for a future procedure. Thanks in advance.

The Youth Welfare Association of Bhopal is building a verified database of emergency voluntary blood donors across the city. If you are residing in Bhopal and want to contribute as an active donor, please register on our website link below.

Important Advisory: Always make sure you have a proper meal and stay fully hydrated before going to donate blood. Avoid fasting or skipping breakfast on the day of donation to prevent dizziness. Be safe while doing a great deed!

A specialized blood donation camp is being set up at the PSG Tech Campus, Coimbatore this coming Wednesday. Organized by the Government Hospital team. All students, alumni, and local residents are warmly invited to join and participate.

Extremely grateful to the young ladies from Delhi University who stepped forward and donated B- blood at Max Hospital Saket last evening. Your immediate response to our message saved our family from an extreme crisis. Thank you so much!

Does anyone know the medical cooling-off period required for blood donation after getting a standard international travel vaccine shot? Planning to attend a neighborhood community camp in Mumbai next weekend. Please clarify if anyone knows.

Blood Donation Camp Alert! Rotary Bangalore is hosting a mobile collection unit right outside the MG Road Metro Station tomorrow from 10:00 AM to 5:30 PM. If you are commuting through this route, please take out a few minutes to save a life today.

Friendly reminder that a single unit of blood can be separated into red cells, plasma, and platelets, potentially saving three separate individuals. Think about the impact you make. Step forward and donate at any authorized center in Chennai today!

Our social group is actively refreshing the database for rare and negative blood group individuals (O-, AB-, A-, B-) across the Kolkata district. If you are willing to receive alerts during extreme shortages, please message us your contact details.

Kudos to the entire medical staff working at Gandhi Hospital Blood Bank, Hyderabad. Stopped by today for a voluntary donation and was deeply impressed by the hygiene standards, speed, and courteous behavior. Highly recommend everyone to visit.

To mark our community anniversary, a mega public blood camp is planned at the Sahakari Complex Ground, Pune this Saturday. Monitored strictly by Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital doctors. E-certificates will be issued to all voluntary donors.

Are individuals on regular oral medication for basic seasonal allergies eligible to donate blood? There is a donation camp taking place at our corporate complex in Jaipur this Thursday and I want to be 100% sure before I register. Thanks!

Heartfelt thanks to the corporate group members who widely shared our message for AB+ blood last week. The scheduled operation at Medanta Lucknow went successfully and the patient has returned home safe. Your digital help saved us.

Public Alert: The Red Cross Blood Bank in Ahmedabad has registered a substantial dip in all common blood group inventories due to extreme weather limiting walk-in crowds. If you are healthy, please visit the Ashram Road facility to donate today.
